authors: Kayli Plotner Patrick Ferrucci a PhD Student in Journalism Studies
raw_title: The Harming and the Helping: Perceived Organizational Effects on Mental Health in the Newsroom
title_en: The Harming and the Helping: Perceived Organizational Effects on Mental Health in the Newsroom
title_zh: 伤害与帮助：新闻编辑室中组织对心理健康的影响感知
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了新闻编辑室中的组织因素如何影响记者的心理健康，区分了可能造成伤害和提供帮助的因素。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how organizational factors in newsrooms affect journalists' mental health, distinguishing between factors that may harm and those that may help.
research_direction_zh: 新闻行业中的职业健康与组织心理学研究，关注媒体工作环境对员工心理福祉的影响。
research_direction_en: Research on occupational health and organizational psychology in journalism, focusing on how media work environments affect employee mental wellbeing.
